title: Photon Sources: SPDC, Quantum Dots, and Deterministic Generation
description: Explore the physics and engineering of single-photon sources, from probabilistic SPDC to deterministic quantum dot emitters, understanding the requirements for quantum computing applications.
learningObjectives: Understand spontaneous parametric down-conversion (SPDC) and its applications
Explain heralded single-photon generation from photon pairs
Describe quantum dot single-photon sources and their advantages
Compare probabilistic and deterministic photon sources
Analyze the figures of merit: brightness, purity, and indistinguishability
